summary: Good‑quality recording capturing a celebrated second set at Landover, highlighted as one of the band’s best shows.
review: The reviewer rates this show four stars and lauds the second set, calling it great and noting the long, historic Landover venue. No specific comments about the source or sonic details are provided, so the recording is presumed decent but its exact type is unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 4‑star review emphasizes a strong second set; lack of detail on the recording limits confidence, but overall impression is positive.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit remarks about sound clarity, mix, or source type; assumed acceptable given overall positive rating.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set singled out as a highlight, suggesting strong momentum and energy throughout the latter half of the concert.
